run_summary.summary: Active day across the pipeline! Aqara Cameras reel is live — ready to invoice for $1,500. SOJOS Vision contract signed today with a first draft deadline of Apr 23 (Kenny negotiated this explicitly). BHG x Walmart is off to the races — first delivery received today, more arriving Saturday, Mahjong girls' night concept ready to film. New inbound: Goldfish Swim School paid family/parenting campaign with a 3-5 day decision window.

suggestions.message: Reel is live and the brand confirmed it Apr 16 — invoice for $1,500 is ready to go! 💸
Kenny negotiated a hard first draft deadline of Apr 23 with Ruby. That's Thursday — Liz should start filming ASAP. 🎬
First delivery received today, rest arriving Saturday (Apr 19). All products in hand by the weekend — great time to schedule the outdoor shoot! 🛋️
National swim school franchise with a paid family/parenting campaign — fits Liz's niche well. Decision window closes in 3-5 days, so needs a look today or tomorrow. 🏊

deals.notes: [Apr 16]: Reel confirmed live — https://www.instagram.com/reel/DXDLWFnjWeI/?igsh=dDM2cGl6dTE3cjB5. Brand rep (misslizdidit@socialmediacollabs.com) asked if it went live; Liz confirmed and shared the link.
deals.activity_note: Apr 16: Reel confirmed posted — moved to Delivered. Invoice for $1,500 ready to send.

deals.next_action: Film first draft for SOJOS Sunglasses (draft due Apr 23)
deals.notes: [Apr 17]: Liz signed contract and returned to Ruby (marketing202@sojosvision.com). Agreed schedule: first draft due Apr 23, second video planned for May. Sunglasses already in hand. Deal is 2 videos total.
deals.activity_note: Apr 17: Liz signed SOJOS contract — moved to Content. First draft deadline Apr 23, second video in May.

deals.next_action: Film outdoor living content — all products should be in by Apr 19
deals.notes: [Apr 17]: First delivery received today (Kenny confirmed). Remaining shipments arriving Sat Apr 19. Products include Southlake 7-piece outdoor dining set + dinnerware (ordered for 6) — Mahjong girls' night concept. Contract signed Apr 13 (net-45 payment terms). Billing contact: Eileen Mchugh (emchugh@people.inc).
deals.activity_note: Apr 17: First product delivery received. Rest arrives Apr 19 — ready to film outdoor content.

deals.next_action: Decide whether to submit interest via Creator Opportunity platform
deals.notes: [Apr 17]: Inbound paid campaign via creatoropportunity.com — 'Let's Talk Parenting, Safety & Swim' with Goldfish Swim School (national franchise). Deliverables: 1 IG Post/Reel OR TikTok OR YouTube + 1-year content licensing. Rate TBD — can propose own terms via platform form. Looking to review options in next 3-5 days. Note: bulk platform outreach (PROMOTIONS label), not a personal pitch.
